text:
Hi Ravi! Thank you for reaching out to Meridian Home Services! 😊

Unfortunately, I wasn't able to process your booking request at this time — nothing has been changed or reserved on your behalf.

I'd love to help you get your HVAC repair scheduled! Here are a few ways I can assist:

- **Try booking again** — I can attempt to set up the appointment for you.
- **Reach our team directly** — Our support staff can manually assist with your booking.

Is there anything else I can help you with, or would you like me to try again? 🔧
